title: Muda Waste Cost Calculator
description: Calculates the total cost of waste (Muda) in industrial processes based on Lean and Six Sigma principles, identifying hidden loss drivers and suggesting corrective actions.

inputs.label: Material Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Direct material cost per unit of product, including raw materials and purchased components.

businessContext_i18n.en: Direct material cost per unit of product, including raw materials and purchased components.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ürün birimi başına doğrudan malzeme maliyeti (hammadde ve satın alınan parçalar dahil).
businessContext_i18n.de: Direkte Materialkosten pro Produkteinheit, einschließlich Rohstoffe und zugekaufte Komponenten
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût matière direct par unité de produit, incluant matières premières et composants achetés.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste directo de material por unidad de producto, incluyendo materias primas y componentes comprados.

inputs.label: Labor Cost per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Average fully burdened labor cost per hour for direct operators.

label_i18n.fr: Coût de la main-d'œuvre par heure
label_i18n.es: Costo de mano de obra por hora

businessContext_i18n.en: Average fully burdened labor cost per hour for direct operators.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Doğrudan operatörler için saat başına ortalama tam yüklü işçilik maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittlicher voll belasteter Lohnsatz pro Stunde für direkte Mitarbeiter
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût horaire moyen entièrement chargé de la main-d'œuvre directe.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste medio de mano de obra directa por hora para operadores directos (incluyendo cargas sociales).

inputs.label: Overhead Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of direct labor cost allocated to manufacturing overhead (ISO 9001 cost accounting).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of direct labor cost allocated to manufacturing overhead (ISO 9001 cost accounting).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Doğrudan işçilik maliyetinin üretim genel giderlerine ayrılan yüzdesi (ISO 9001 maliyet muhasebesi).
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der direkten Lohnkosten, der den Fertigungsgemeinkosten zugeordnet wird (ISO 9001 Kostenrechnung)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage du coût de main-d'œuvre directe alloué aux frais généraux de fabrication (ISO 9001 comptabilité analytique).
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje del coste de mano de obra directa asignado a gastos generales de fabricación (contabilidad de costes ISO 9001).

inputs.label: Defect Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of units produced that are defective and require rework or scrap (Six Sigma DPMO metric).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of units produced that are defective and require rework or scrap (Six Sigma DPMO metric).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Üretilen birimlerin yeniden işlem veya fire gerektiren kusurlu yüzdesi (Altı Sigma DPMO metriği).
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der produzierten Einheiten, die fehlerhaft sind und Nacharbeit oder Ausschuss erfordern (Six Sigma DPMO-Kennzahl)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage d'unités produites défectueuses nécessitant reprise ou rebut (métrique Six Sigma DPMO).
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de unidades producidas que son defectuosas y requieren retrabajo o desperdicio (métrica DPMO de Seis Sigma).

inputs.label: Rework Time per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Average time spent reworking a defective unit.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average time spent reworking a defective unit.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kusurlu bir birimi yeniden işlemek için harcanan ortalama süre.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Zeit für die Nacharbeit einer fehlerhaften Einheit
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps moyen passé à reprendre une unité défectueuse.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tiempo medio dedicado a retrabajar una unidad defectuosa.

inputs.label: Scrap Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of defective units that are scrapped (cannot be reworked).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of defective units that are scrapped (cannot be reworked).
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der fehlerhaften Einheiten, die ausgeschossen werden (nicht nacharbeitbar)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage d'unités défectueuses mises au rebut (ne peuvent pas être retravaillées).
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de unidades defectuosas que se desechan (no se pueden retrabajar).

inputs.label: Waiting Time per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Average idle time per unit due to bottlenecks, material shortages, or equipment downtime (Lean Takt time analysis).

businessContext_i18n.en: Average idle time per unit due to bottlenecks, material shortages, or equipment downtime (Lean Takt time analysis).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Darboğazlar, malzeme eksiklikleri veya ekipman duruşları nedeniyle birim başına ortalama boşta kalma süresi (Yalın Takt süresi analizi).
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Leerlaufzeit pro Einheit aufgrund von Engpässen, Materialmangel oder Maschinenstillstand (Lean Taktzeit-Analyse)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps d'inactivité moyen par unité dû aux goulots d'étranglement, pénuries de matériaux ou temps d'arrêt des équipements (analyse du temps de takt Lean).
businessContext_i18n.es: Tiempo medio de inactividad por unidad debido a cuellos de botella, escasez de material o paradas de equipo (análisis de tiempo takt Lean).

inputs.label: Excess Motion Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Cost of unnecessary worker movement (walking, reaching) per unit, based on time-motion studies.

label_i18n.fr: Coût de mouvement excessif par unité
label_i18n.es: Coste de movimiento excesivo por unidad

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost of unnecessary worker movement (walking, reaching) per unit, based on time-motion studies.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Zaman-hareket etüdlerine dayalı olarak, birim başına gereksiz işçi hareketinin (yürüme, uzanma) maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kosten unnötiger Arbeiterbewegungen (Gehen, Greifen) pro Einheit, basierend auf Zeit- und Bewegungsstudien.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût des déplacements inutiles des travailleurs (marche, portée) par unité, basé sur des études de temps et de mouvement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste del movimiento innecesario del trabajador (caminar, alcanzar) por unidad, basado en estudios de tiempos y movimientos.

rules.message: Defect rate must be greater than or equal to scrap rate.
Overhead rate must be between 0% and 500%.
Production volume must be greater than zero.

thresholds.alert: Defect cost exceeds $50,000. Immediate Six Sigma DMAIC intervention recommended.
Waiting cost exceeds $20,000. Consider value stream mapping and Takt time adjustment.
Overproduction cost exceeds $100,000. Implement pull system (Kanban).
Data confidence is low. Verify input accuracy and consider data collection improvement.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
